title: Browser Automation Tool Execution
key_participants: JSExecutor (browser WebSocket client, nested in start_ws_server)
interaction_flow: --- JS Execution Path ---
Agent → GenericAgentHandler: tool call do_web_execute_js(args={script, switch_tab_id, no_monitor})
GenericAgentHandler → web_execute_js(script, switch_tab_id, no_monitor): module-level fn
web_execute_js: if driver is None → first_init_driver() → TMWebDriver()
web_execute_js: if switch_tab_id → driver.default_session_id = switch_tab_id
web_execute_js → simphtml.execute_js_rich(script, driver, no_monitor)
execute_js_rich: if not no_monitor → get_html(driver, extra_js=temp_monitor_js) as baseline snapshot
execute_js_rich → driver.execute_js(script)
TMWebDriver.execute_js: resolves session_id (default if None, fallback to alive session)
TMWebDriver.execute_js: exec_id = uuid4(); payload = json({id, code[, tabId]})
TMWebDriver.execute_js [WS/ext_ws path]: session.ws_client.send_message(payload) → WebSocket → JSExecutor in browser
TMWebDriver.execute_js [HTTP path]: session.http_queue.put(payload) → browser long-polls /api/longpoll → receives payload
Browser Tab (JSExecutor): executes JS, sends back {type:'result'|'error', id:exec_id, result/error, newTabs:[]}
JSExecutor.handle(): data.type=='result' → driver.results[exec_id] = {success:True, data:..., newTabs:[]}
JSExecutor.handle(): data.type=='error'  → driver.results[exec_id] = {success:False, data:...}
JSExecutor.handle(): data.type=='ack'    → driver.acks[exec_id] = True (resets timeout)
TMWebDriver.execute_js: polls self.results every 0.2s until exec_id present or timeout
TMWebDriver.execute_js → returns {data: result['data'], newTabs: [...]}
execute_js_rich: if not reloaded → get_html() again → find_changed_elements(before, after) → diff_summary
execute_js_rich → returns {js_return, status, reloaded, newTabs, transients, dom_diff}
web_execute_js → returns result dict to do_web_execute_js
do_web_execute_js: optionally saves js_return to file, formats via smart_format
do_web_execute_js → yields status string + returns StepOutcome(result_json)
--- Page Scan Path ---
Agent → GenericAgentHandler: do_web_scan(args={tabs_only, switch_tab_id, text_only})
do_web_scan → web_scan(tabs_only, switch_tab_id, text_only)
web_scan: builds tabs list from driver.get_all_sessions()
web_scan: if switch_tab_id → driver.default_session_id = switch_tab_id
web_scan [if not tabs_only] → simphtml.get_html(driver, cutlist=True, maxchars=35000)
get_html → driver.execute_js(js_findMainList + 'return findMainList(document.body);')
get_html → returns simplified/truncated HTML string
web_scan → returns {status, metadata:{tabs, active_tab}, content: html}
--- Code Run Path ---
Agent → GenericAgentHandler: do_code_run(args={type, code/script, timeout, cwd})
do_code_run → code_run(code, code_type, timeout, cwd, code_cwd, stop_signal)
code_run [python]: writes code to tempfile (.ai.py), prepends code_run_header.py
code_run [python]: cmd = [sys.executable, -X utf8, -u, tmp_path]
code_run [powershell/bash]: cmd = [powershell/-Command | bash/-c, code]
code_run: subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=PIPE, stderr=STDOUT)
code_run: stream_reader thread reads stdout line-by-line, yields output
code_run: kills process on timeout or stop_signal
code_run → yields progress string, returns {status, stdout, exit_code}
do_code_run → returns StepOutcome(result)
--- Switch Tab ---
Agent tool args include switch_tab_id → do_web_execute_js or do_web_scan sets driver.default_session_id = switch_tab_id before execute_js
--- Remote Mode (is_remote=True) ---
TMWebDriver.execute_js: POST http://{host}:{port+1}/link {cmd:'execute_js', sessionId, code, timeout}
Remote /link handler → calls execute_js locally → returns json({r: result})
key_relationships: GenericAgentHandler depends_on web_execute_js, web_scan, code_run (module-level functions in ga.py)
TMWebDriver composes JSExecutor (nested WebSocket handler class, instantiated per WS connection)
TMWebDriver composes WebSocketServer (ws://{host}:{port}) + bottle HTTP server ({host}:{port+1})
Session wraps ws_client (WebSocket) or http_queue (queue.Queue) based on type: ws|ext_ws|http
important_notes: TMWebDriver.__init__: checks if remote server already running (socket connect_ex port+1). If remote, delegates via HTTP /link; if local, starts both WS and HTTP servers.
Session types: 'ws' = injected userscript via WebSocket; 'ext_ws' = browser extension managing multiple tabs; 'http' = long-poll fallback.
execute_js timeout: resets when ACK received (acks dict). Without ACK, timeout = original. With ACK, timeout measured from ACK time.
Tab disconnect/reconnect: if session becomes inactive mid-execution, returns {result: 'Session reloaded.', closed:1}.
execute_js_rich: captures pre/post DOM snapshot via get_html for change detection (find_changed_elements diff). Skipped if no_monitor=True.
code_run: python scripts written to temp .ai.py file (deleted in finally), code_run_header.py prepended. inline_eval flag allows exec/eval in-process.
Switch tab: simply sets driver.default_session_id before execute_js call; no explicit WS message needed.
ext_ws (extension): all tabs share ONE WebSocket connection; tabId is sent in payload so extension routes to correct tab.

key_methods.TMWebDriver.execute_js(code, timeout=15,: Core dispatch: finds session, creates UUID exec_id, sends payload via WS or HTTP queue, polls self.results dict
key_methods.TMWebDriver.start_ws_server(): Creates WebSocketServer with nested JSExecutor class; runs in daemon thread
key_methods.JSExecutor.handle(): Parses JSON message: ready→_register_client; result/error→driver.results[id]; ack→driver.acks[id]; tabs_update→update sessions
key_methods.TMWebDriver._register_client(session_id,: Creates or reconnects Session; updates default/latest session_id
key_methods.simphtml.execute_js_rich(script, driver,: Wraps execute_js with pre/post HTML snapshot and DOM diff; returns enriched result
key_methods.web_execute_js(script, switch_tab_id, no: Module-level: lazy-init driver, set active tab, call execute_js_rich
key_methods.web_scan(tabs_only, switch_tab_id, text_: Returns tab list + simplified page HTML via execute_js
key_methods.code_run(code, code_type, timeout, cwd,: Generator: writes temp file, Popen subprocess, streams stdout, kills on timeout
